response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates over a decade of full-stack development experience with a strong emphasis on TypeScript, Node.js, and modern frameworks like React and Nest.js. His recent work at re:cinq and Optilyz aligns closely with the role's stack and responsibilities, including AI-agent infrastructure and large-scale automation tooling. His open-source contributions and leadership in developer tooling further validate his expertise and cultural fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with the exact stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js)
Proven track record in building scalable, high-impact systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation, AI-agent infrastructure)
Strong open-source contributions and thought leadership in developer tooling and testing
concerns: Broad but occasionally fragmented experience across many languages (DLang, Java, C#) may dilute depth in the primary stack
Limited explicit mention of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) or Kubernetes in recent roles
German language skills are basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team
